title: euphorbia salicifolia subsp. schurii
intro: Euphorbia salicifolia subsp. schurii, also known as the willow-leaf euphorbia, is a species of succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to the presence of anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Euphorbia salicifolia subsp. schurii include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and crushing the leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or poultices for topical application.
